projectDescription: A free, open-source wedding website template with RSVP via Google Sheets, Add to Calendar, Google Maps, Uber booking, and a YouTube video showcase — hostable on GitHub Pages with no backend required.
keyFeatures: RSVP form that submits data directly to a Google Sheet via Google Apps Script
Email alerts to the couple when someone RSVPs
Add to Calendar support for Google, Apple, Outlook, and Yahoo calendars
One-tap Book Uber button pre-filled with the venue location
Interactive Google Maps embed showing the venue
Responsive design with smooth scroll, animated waypoints, and a mobile hamburger menu
Free hosting on GitHub Pages — no backend server or database required
SCSS-based theming with Gulp build pipeline for CSS/JS compilation
publicApiSurface: RSVP form fields: email, name, extras (number of guests), invite_code
initMap() — Google Maps initializer called by the Maps JS API callback
initBBSRMap() — alternate map initializer for a different venue location
createCalendar(options) — ouical.js helper to generate Add to Calendar widget
